name: MAC-10 | 通勤者皮革
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been painted with a plaid hydrographic and partly wrapped in faux crocodile leather. They took the bait, let's move... - Elliott Kingsman, Mercenary
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器使用格子呢花纹进行了涂装，枪的部分用人造鳄鱼皮包裹。 他们中招了，我们上… - 雇佣兵埃利奥特.金士曼
